notes: In seven of 12 seed-production populations the same labelled plants supplied morphology/pollen and later capsule data; five populations lost labels. Cupular-bract height was measured, but the focal exsertion variable combines flower length and bract height, so attraction/access and protection are not independently estimated. Supplement contains population summaries rather than recoverable individual-level rows. The four directional Part I paths and a linked total reproductive-fitness surface are not estimated.

Title-validated Dryad archive 10.5061/dryad.0j96d17 provides a recoverable individual-plant processed panel. A_flower is early-season floral-lip redness and B_flower is early-season floral condensed tannins; both were measured before supplemental treatments. Four HC3 treatment-adjusted observational trait-path estimates are registered in four_path_effect_registry.csv. Condensed tannins remain a chemical barrier candidate rather than a manipulated defense. CH fruit and seed component surfaces exist but are not a total reproductive-fitness surface; D2 and D3 are not identified.

Aphid infestation of vegetative phloem reduced floral volatile emission, but the pollinator analysis compared aphid treatments rather than floral volatile emission as a manipulated or modelled predictor (F(2,35)=0.02, P=0.985; total landings per day). No flower-stage antagonist response was measured. The study is retained as a screened cross-organ background case, not M1/M2 evidence and not a four-path effect record.

extraction_status: Floral production, flower-head size, bloom duration, floral volatiles, and pollen chemistry were measured with behavioral attractiveness to florivorous Olibrus beetles. No pollination response was measured. The public screen did not recover an eligible trait-to-antagonist effect estimate with uncertainty and declared exposure, and terpenoids were not assigned as B_flower without independent flower-specific barrier efficacy. Retain as M1 descriptive mechanism evidence only.

notes: Exact Crossref metadata and a publisher content URL were recovered, but the publisher PDF probe returned HTTP 403; OpenAlex reported no OA route; DataCite and Zenodo did not yield a verified article-linked data package. A generic Dryad search response was not relation-verified and is not used. No article table, denominator, effect estimate, or uncertainty is recoverable under the public-only rule.
